nextSteps: Get bundle ID: xcodebuildmcp device get-app-bundle-id --app-path <TMPDIR>/Build/Products/Debug-iphoneos/CalculatorApp.app
Install app on device: xcodebuildmcp device install --device-id DEVICE_UDID --app-path <TMPDIR>/Build/Products/Debug-iphoneos/CalculatorApp.app
Launch app on device: xcodebuildmcp device launch --device-id DEVICE_UDID --bundle-id BUNDLE_ID
